# Offer Brief

Owner: `offer-positioning-strategist`

```yaml
offer_brief:
  id: offer-YYYYMMDD-slug
  product_bet_id:
  product_bet_revision_ref:
  owner: offer-positioning-strategist
  created_at:
```

## Offer

```yaml
offer:
  ICP:
  buyer:
  current_workaround:
  painful_job:
  one_line_promise:
  USP:
  value_prop:
  offer_angle:
  positioning_statement:
  competitor_alternative_angle:
  first_value_moment:
```

## Pricing And Packaging

```yaml
pricing_and_packaging:
  pricing_frame:
  expected_price:
  plan_shape:
  trial_or_free_plan:
  guarantee_or_no_guarantee:
  reason_price_is_plausible:
  pricing_risks:
```

## Objections

```yaml
objections:
  main_objections:
    - objection:
      response:
      evidence_ref:
      still_risky: yes | no
  proof_needed_to_make_offer_believable:
  claims_to_avoid:
```

## Claims Review

```yaml
claims_review:
  forbidden_claims:
  supported_claims:
  inferred_claims:
  prohibited_or_unsupported_claims:
  review_status: pass | warn | fail
  sufficiency_status: pass | retry | escalate
```
